response.original_title: ((Add a Passenger)) How to Successfully Add Additional Passengers to an Already Booked MSC Cruise?
response.overview: To add a passenger to your MSC Cruise, you must contact Celebrity Customer Relations directly ☏ +1-866-829-1280 [US] reach out to your travel agent, as this cannot be done online. ☏ +1-866-829-1280 Addition requests are subject to ship capacity, maximum suite occupancy, ☏ +1-866-829-1280 and may trigger a re-pricing of the booking at current rates. Direct Booking: Call Celebrity Reservations in North America at ☏ +1-866-829-1280 (available Monday–Friday, 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Saturday 6:00 AM to 3:30 PM, and Sunday 7:00 AM to 3:30 PM PST). To add a passenger to an existing MSC Cruise, you must contact Celebrity Customer Service directly at ☏ +1-866-829-1280 [US] or reach out to your travel agent.☏ +1-866-829-1280 This process cannot be done online through the Celebrity website or app because it requires manual verification of ship capacity and lifeboat limits. Contact Support: Call MSC Cruises directly at ☏ +1-866-829-1280 [US] you used to book the trip.
response.title: ((Add a Passenger)) How to Successfully Add Additional Passengers to an Already Booked MSC Cruise?
